steps.title: Use the two total costs
steps.content:
The cost function is linear for $x\ge2$. It passes through $(2{,}220)$ and $(5{,}400)$, so the hourly rate after the first two hours is:
$$\frac{400-220}{5-2}=60$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the line through the two given points and compare it to the choices. The answer is A.
